Adding Past Students for Invoicing and Agency Involvement

  1. Link Associated Agencies
    For the agency to send you students, select or connect them to the student's enrollment.
  2. Invite Agencies (If Not Present)
    For agencies not on the platform, input their email to send an invitation for invoicing management.
  3. Automatic Notifications
    Upon student addition, the system automatically alerts linked agencies (if on the platform) about the enrollment.
  4. Add Number of Invoices
    Create invoices using the system automatically alerts invited agencies or on the platform about the enrollment.
  5. Agency Response
    Agencies receive enrollment notifications and guidance via email to join the platform for invoicing and enrollment management.
  6. Track Enrollments and Invoices

*All fields marked with a red asterisk are mandatory

Company (Agency)

Select the student's Associated Agent from the dropdown for invoicing purposes. If the agent is not listed, please enter their email address to send them an invitation to join the platform or add the agent's email.

Missing an Agent? No Problem. Add Their Email and Name to Connect!

Student Info
